cd /app && python3 -c "
import re
with open('src/codegen.rs', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Fix the specific regex pattern for FieldType::Ref 
pattern = r'    pub fn (\w+)\(&self\) -> (\w+) \{\{\n        &self\.(\w+)\n    \}\}\n\n'
replacement = r'    pub fn \1(&self) -> &\2 {\n        &self.\3\n    }\n\n'
fixed_content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content)

with open('src/codegen.rs', 'w') as f:
    f.write(fixed_content)
"
cd /app && cargo run generate complex > /tmp/generated.rs && cat /tmp/generated.rs
